action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline MetricGAN+ gives PESQ 3.134 on test, ~2.91 on val (200 samples). Generator has 1.9M params, BLSTM mask network. Forward + grad work. Analysis: Best path is MetricGAN+ adversarial fine-tuning - train a PESQ-predicting discriminator and fine-tune G to maximize predicted PESQ. This is the original MetricGAN+ method, proven to improve PESQ. Let me implement this carefully. Key components: (1) G = enhance_model BLSTM mask predictor, (2) D = simple CNN that takes (clean_mag, est_mag) or (clean_mag, clean_mag) and predicts PESQ score in [0,1] (normalized), (3) Train D to predict PESQ from generated/clean pairs, (4) Train G adversarially to maximize D output (target=1.0). Use historical replay buffer of generated samples for D stability. Decision: Write training script. Start with short run (~30 min) and validate val PESQ improvement.
